message.content:
@startuml
actor Admin
participant "Webhook Server" as WS
actor Consumer

== Register webhook ==
Admin -> WS : 1 Register webhook consumer\n--\nreturn OK
WS --> Admin : 2 OK

== Event received ==
Admin -> WS : 3 Event
activate WS
note right of WS #lightyellow: Store event in DB
deactivate WS

== Consumer connected ==
Consumer <- WS : 5 Connect over WS

loop 
    note left of WS #FFCCCC: Load webhooks from DB
end loop

loop 
    WS -[#green]> Consumer : 7 Forward forwarding events
end loop

group Ack messages by webhook ID [dashed]
    return message to Webhook server via websocket connection using same channel used for sending forwarded events back earlier step number six above where we loaded all registered consumers' information into memory so now they can receive their respective payloads accordingly without having any issues related thereto such delays etcetera...
    
@enduml
